improvement: Added a privacy-bounded phone runtime evidence exporter that packages same-attempt audibility evidence with deployment identity and explicit limits, then exposes it through a 44px copy control.

verification.contract_test: committed and wired into test:local-gate and test:pages-preview

privacy_boundary: The exported packet allowlists audibility, pulse, render, and deployment identity fields; unrelated window state is excluded.
limits: Browser render progress does not prove physical speaker output.
No successful deployment or phone retest was observed in this run.
